label: Bastion Quartermaster Vault
description: A windowless warehouse bay of black slagcrete and riveted wreck-plate, set deep within Vespera Tertius Nocturnis Bastion’s interlocked tiers. Tall racking arrays and caged pallets rise beneath a low grid of shock-braced beams, their housings overbuilt to withstand electrostatic gust-load transmitted through the city’s enclosed causeways. Hazard chevrons and lumen strips cut hard lines across the ash-stained floor, while sealed bulk bins and numbered lockers impose strict compartmentation on all stores. Vox-suppression baffling and heavy gasketed doors reduce auroral backwash interference, making the interior notably still compared to the storm-scraped exterior works.
